text.title: react-hooks Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure converting a feature brief into a validated hooks-spec.

step.name: classify-state-slices
step.input: Feature brief listing every piece of state the feature owns or reads.
step.action: For each slice, ask: server / form / global-UI / local. Route to TanStack Query / React Hook Form / Zustand / useState respectively.

step.name: decide-local-hook-shape
step.action: If the slice is a single primitive or a 1–2 field object → keep useState. If multi-field interrelated state (3+ fields whose transitions are coupled) → upgrade to useReducer.
step.output: Refined state_slices with useState ↔ useReducer corrected.
step.decision-gate: Reject any state_slice that uses useState for >3 interrelated fields without an explicit justification.

step.name: declare-effects-and-deps
step.input: Side-effect list from the feature brief (subscribe, fetch, listener, timer).
step.action: For each effect, declare deps as primitives only; mark cleanup_present=true; mark uses_abort_controller=true for fetches.
step.output: effects: array of {name, deps[], cleanup_present, uses_abort_controller}.
step.decision-gate: Reject any effect with cleanup_present=false whose name contains subscribe / listener / interval / fetch.

step.name: memoize-decisions
step.input: Profiler trace (if available) + the list of values passed to memoized children or effect deps.
step.action: Add memoization entries only with a justification > 10 chars referencing a profiling fact or a downstream stable-ref consumer.
step.output: memoization: array (often empty when React Compiler is enabled).

step.name: assemble-and-validate
step.output: Validated spec ready for the codegen agent.
step.decision-gate: Validator must exit 0 before the spec is returned to the caller.
